sprites.prompt: SPRITES detailed pixel art sprite sheet of one single armored knight character only, same identity in every frame, helmeted with no visible hair variation, sword and shield, right-facing side profile in all frames. EXACTLY 8-frame battle idle animation in a strict 4 columns x 2 rows grid, equal frame boxes, consistent scale and alignment. Idle motion only: subtle breathing, cape flutter, shield-arm micro shift. No walking, no turning, no front-facing view, no alternate characters, no collage, no large central overlay. Transparent alpha background required. Style inspirations: Loop Hero, Celeste, Eastward, Octopath Traveler II, Little Witch in the Woods, Sea of Stars, Owlboy. For a 2D fantasy dungeon-crawling deckbuilder roguelite like Slay the Spire.
